title: 4H-Evaluations
subtitle: A desktop tool built to make copying and organizing MN 4-H evaluations easier.
description: A utility built to simplify the yearly process of handling MN 4-H evaluation files.
It reduces manual searching, filtering, copying, and renaming so evaluation packets can be prepared faster and with fewer mistakes.
features: Reads all files in a selected evaluation directory
Participant selection UI with progressive filtering
Copy and rename workflow for evaluation files

screenshots.title: diagram
screenshots.body: striped down diagram for explaining how it works

screenshots.title: UI diaggram
screenshots.body: this is the UI that was agreed upon

howItWorks: On first startup each year, the program asks for the evaluations directory and participant list path.
It opens a UI with layered filters that appear as earlier selections are made.
The copy workflow includes a safety check that prevents copying until a valid destination is selected.
setupInstall: Run the program and answer the startup path questions.

progressNotes: Project setup and data foundation (2023-09)
Created initial project structure and clarified requirements.
Built system to read Excel format rows into structured records.
Implemented entry record handling and parsing logic.
Core functionality development (2023-12)
Developed functions to find, copy, clone, and rename evaluation files.
Built core backend automation logic.
Established main data processing workflow.
System configuration and persistence (2023-12 to 2024-01)
Implemented settings system with save and load functionality.
Improved project structure for repeat yearly use.
Added safety checks for required inputs and destinations.
Frontend GUI development (2024-01)
Built main user interface with participant selection.
Created dynamic filtering system that expands based on input.
Developed GUI driver logic and interaction handling.
Integration and testing (2024-01-26)
Connected frontend UI with backend systems.
Tested full application workflow and edge cases.
Refined usability and interaction flow.
Debugging and system refinement (2024-02)
Identified and resolved bugs across UI and backend.
Improved reliability of file operations and data handling.
Optimized performance and stability.
Final structure and deployment setup (Feb 2024)
Built server/client structure for deployment.
Prepared application for real-world usage.
Finalized system behavior before project cancellation.
